popularStory.headline: Henri VI de Luxembourg (1250-1288)
popularStory.description:
Henri VI de Luxembourg, né en 1250, tué à Worringen le 5 juin 1288, fut comte de Luxembourg et d'Arlon de 1281 à 1288. Il était fils d'Henri V, comte de Luxembourg, et de Marguerite de Bar.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond於1430年6月11日出生在英國賀特福爾姆 哈達哈姆時，他的父親Sir Owain Tudor Knight30歲，母親Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France28歲。他於1455年11月1日與Margaret Beaufort在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1456年11月1日在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾卡馬特享年26歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯布洛可爾聖 戴維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Tudor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Tudur, a derivative of British Celtic Toutorīx, literally ‘people’ + ‘king’. It has sometimes been taken as a Welsh equivalent of Latin Theodorus, from Greek Theodōros ‘gift of God’ (see Theodore ), for which the usual Welsh form is Tewdwr.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Tudor, a variant of Teodor (see Theodore ).

History: The Tudor royal family, English sovereigns from the accession of Henry VII in 1485 to the death of Elizabeth I in 1603, were of Welsh origin, being descended from Owain ap Maredudd ap Tudur, who held lands at Penmynydd in Anglesey.

variants.name: Theodore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Serge, Henri, Pierre, Alide, Andre, Antoine, Benoit, Berthony, Chantal, Daphnee, Edouard, Guilene.

French and Mauritian (Théodore); West Indian (in Haiti, Martinique, and Guadeloupe Théodore); English and Welsh: from a personal name derived from Greek Theodōros, a compound of theos ‘God’ + dōron ‘gift’, which was relatively popular in the Middle Ages because of its auspicious meaning. The name was borne by several early Christian saints. There was considerable confusion with the ancient Germanic name Theodoric (see Terry ). In Wales, the personal name Theodore was also adopted as an approximation to the Welsh name Tewdwr (see Tudor ). In North America, this surname has absorbed various other European cognates and their derivatives, e.g. Greek Theodorakis , Macedonian Todorovski, and Serbian Todorović (see Todorovic ).

variants.name: Tedder
meanings: English (Surrey): from the Middle English personal name Thedere, Teddere, which is either from the Old English personal name Thēodhere (from thēod ‘people’ + here ‘army’) or from the cognate ancient Germanic personal name Theudher, which seems to have been adopted by the Normans. Alternatively, perhaps it may be an occupational name from Middle English teddere ‘one who teds’, i.e. a person whose occupation was to spread mown grass for drying.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond was born on 11 June 1430, in Much Hadham, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Sir Owain Tudor Knight, was 30 and his mother, Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France, was 28. He married Margaret Beaufort on 1 November 1455, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 1 November 1456, in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 26, and was buried in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond est né le 11 juin 1430, à Much Hadham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Owain Tudor Knight, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Beaufort le 1 novembre 1455, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 1 novembre 1456, à Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond am 11. Juni 1430 in Much Hadham, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Owain Tudor Knight 30 und seine Mutter Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France 28. Er hat am 1. November 1455 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales Margaret Beaufort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 1. November 1456 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Beaufort il 1 novembre 1455, nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmondが1430年6月11日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアムチ ハドハムで生まれた時，父Sir Owain Tudor Knightは30歳，母Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of Franceは28歳であった。1455年11月1日にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクでMargaret Beaufortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1456年11月1日にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアカーマースンで26歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスト ダヴィズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond(이)가 1430년 6월 11일 영국 허트퍼드실르 무치 하드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Owain Tudor Knight(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1455년 11월 1일 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 Margaret Beaufort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1456년 11월 1일 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 카마테에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 스트 데이비드즈에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Tudor 1st Earl of Richmond родился 11 июня 1430 г. в местности муч хадхам, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Owain Tudor Knight было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Beaufort 1 ноября 1455 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 1 ноября 1456 г. в местности кармартен, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности ст дэвидс, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
